message:
feat(core): direct-simple UPDATE/DELETE fast path (T1.3 / IMPL-1)

Mirror the prepared direct-simple INSERT fast path for narrow UPDATE /
DELETE DML inside an explicit transaction: `UPDATE t SET c = <val>, ...
WHERE rowid_alias = ?N` and `DELETE FROM t WHERE rowid_alias = ?N` on
single-table, rowid-targeted shapes with no triggers / FK / indexes /
CHECK / generated columns route directly through a BtCursor, bypassing
the VDBE register file, dispatch loop, and memdb mirror ceremony.

Adds `PreparedDirectSimpleUpdate` / `PreparedDirectSimpleDelete` gate
builders, `execute_prepared_direct_simple_update[_with_cursor]` and the
DELETE equivalents, two new execution counters exposed through
`HotPathProfileSnapshot`, a reusable row-value scratch to amortize
`parse_record_into` allocation, and two unit tests covering correctness
and index-skip behavior. Dispatch is wired through
`execute_precompiled_prepared_update_delete_body` under the existing
in-transaction fast-lane gate, with graceful fall-through on
`NotImplemented`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
